tools.name: gather.status
tools.description: Emit Gather readiness and next actions as a Project Telos action envelope.

tools.name: gather.doctor
tools.description: Check Gather operator-spine readiness.

tools.name: gather.docs
tools.description: Read local text files or directories and emit provenance receipts.

tools.name: gather.arxiv
tools.description: Fetch current arXiv metadata by id or query and emit provenance receipts.

tools.name: gather.run
tools.description: Run a multi-source research intake config and emit a witnessed run record.

tools.name: index.map
tools.description: Map a workspace or repo and emit structural context.

tools.name: index.context
tools.description: Render a compact context pack from a workspace graph.

tools.name: index.context.envelope
tools.description: Return a budgeted, receipt-backed context envelope for large-codebase agent workflows.

tools.name: index.status
tools.description: Emit Index readiness and next actions as a Project Telos action envelope.

tools.name: index.doctor
tools.description: Check Index operator-spine readiness.

tools.name: forum.route
tools.description: Route a request to a capability lane and expose low-confidence escalation.

tools.name: forum.ledger.summary
tools.description: Summarize a witnessed causal ledger.

tools.name: forum.prose.humanize
tools.description: Clarify model or agent prose for operators without adding facts.

tools.name: forum.status
tools.description: Emit Forum readiness and next actions as a Project Telos action envelope.

tools.name: forum.doctor
tools.description: Check Forum operator-spine readiness.

tools.name: crucible.status
tools.description: Emit crucible readiness and next actions as a Project Telos action envelope.

tools.name: crucible.doctor
tools.description: Check crucible operator-spine readiness.

tools.name: crucible.assess
tools.description: Assess falsifiable claims against measurements and emit MATCH/DRIFT/UNVERIFIABLE verdicts.

tools.name: crucible.recheck
tools.description: Recheck a persisted assessment or replay descriptor-bearing measurements.

tools.name: crucible.run
tools.description: Run steelman, measurement, assessment, disk recheck, and optional packet writes.

tools.name: crucible.measurement_gate
tools.description: Verify Telos creative/rendering measurement packets against explicit criteria.

tools.name: crucible.review
tools.description: Validate a cleanroom review bundle before verifier handoff.

tools.name: crucible.report
tools.description: Render a deterministic Markdown report for a witnessed assessment.

tools.name: crucible.batch
tools.description: Assess a manifest of thesis jobs into a registry.

tools.name: crucible.registry
tools.description: List, verify, summarize, search, or prune a crucible registry.

tools.name: crucible.drift
tools.description: Compare the latest two verified assessments in a registry.

tools.name: crucible.refine
tools.description: Run the deterministic refine loop over a substrate-round config.

tools.name: crucible.verdicts
tools.description: List or re-check witnessed assessments in a registry.

tools.name: telos.status
tools.description: Use when a host needs current Telos workbench readiness and next actions. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns a JSON action envelope.

tools.name: telos.doctor
tools.description: Use before demos, listings, or agent runs to check local Telos operator-spine health. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns JSON check results.

tools.name: telos.room
tools.description: Use when an agent needs the current five-flagship room summary before routing work. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns a JSON action envelope.

tools.name: telos.catalog
tools.description: Use when a host needs the provider-neutral catalog of Project Telos MCP tools and next actions. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns a JSON catalog.

tools.name: telos.server.manifest
tools.description: Use when configuring MCP clients for gather, index, forum, crucible, and telos source checkouts. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns a JSON server manifest.

tools.name: telos.mcp.freshness
tools.description: Use when a host must compare loaded MCP servers against expected versions, tools, and probes. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns JSON MATCH, DRIFT, or UNVERIFIABLE freshness receipts.

tools.name: telos.ci.doctor
tools.description: Use when a host needs GitHub Actions runtime, action-major, and latest five-flagship CI compatibility receipts. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns a JSON CI doctor register.

tools.name: telos.ci.triage
tools.description: Use when a host needs to separate fatal GitHub Actions gate failures from Node runtime migration warnings before routing remediation. Read-only, no external side effects, and no external writes. Supports zero-auth offline fixture packets and live gh run intake through the CLI using local gh auth when required. Returns JSON MATCH, DRIFT, or UNVERIFIABLE CI triage receipts.

tools.name: telos.presentation.doctor
tools.description: Use when a host needs five-flagship README, changelog, and brand-asset presentation parity receipts. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns JSON MATCH, DRIFT, or UNVERIFIABLE presentation receipts.

tools.name: telos.accessibility.doctor
tools.description: Use when a host needs static HTML accessibility, reduced-motion, keyboard, and canvas-fallback receipts for Telos Studio surfaces. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns JSON MATCH, DRIFT, or UNVERIFIABLE accessibility receipts.

tools.name: telos.performance.doctor
tools.description: Use when a host needs static Studio performance, efficiency, asset-budget, and embedding receipts. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns JSON MATCH, DRIFT, or UNVERIFIABLE performance receipts.

tools.name: telos.compatibility.doctor
tools.description: Use when a host needs CLI, MCP, protocol, manifest, and integration compatibility receipts. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns JSON MATCH, DRIFT, or UNVERIFIABLE compatibility receipts.

tools.name: telos.operator.doctor
tools.description: Use when a host needs README, status, catalog, manifest, CI, and current-state discoverability receipts for the Telos operator surface. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns JSON MATCH, DRIFT, or UNVERIFIABLE operator receipts.

tools.name: telos.admission.telemetry
tools.description: Use when designing trace fields that keep action admission separate from verification verdicts. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns a JSON telemetry convention.

tools.name: telos.context.envelope
tools.description: Use when large-workspace context needs readable source refs, budgets, and receipt chains. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns a JSON context-envelope convention.

tools.name: telos.context.pack
tools.description: Use when preparing a bounded handoff packet for large-codebase agent work. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns a validated JSON context pack with hashes and verdicts.

tools.name: telos.action.receipt
tools.description: Use when modeling proposed action, admission, execution, review, and compensation records. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns a JSON action-receipt interface.

tools.name: telos.loop.ledger
tools.description: Use when an agent loop needs durable state across fresh contexts and bounded scheduled runs. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns a JSON loop-ledger convention.

tools.name: telos.objective.monitor
tools.description: Use when checking whether proxy metrics are drifting away from real agent or build objectives. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns JSON objective-monitor signals.

tools.name: telos.model.foundry
tools.description: Use when planning model-foundry work across hosted, local, open-weight, post-training, and verifier gates. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns a JSON model-foundry contract.

tools.name: telos.learning.forge
tools.description: Use when video, channel, paper, and benchmark leads need to become receipt-backed learning labs before synthesis. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns a JSON Learning Forge packet.

tools.name: telos.learning.labs
tools.description: Use when Learning Forge source leads need executable lab contracts with measurements, failure cases, and five-flagship ownership. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns a JSON Learning Forge labs packet.

tools.name: telos.research.seed
tools.description: Use when terse research notes need source-backed seed packets before synthesis. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns JSON research seeds with provenance status.

tools.name: telos.research.thermodynamic
tools.description: Use when exploring thermodynamic or stochastic AI-chip research through public transcript evidence. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns a JSON research receipt with verification labels.

tools.name: telos.rendering.research
tools.description: Use when collecting rendering leads for clustered-forward, Gaussian splatting, creative coding, and graphics demos. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns JSON research seeds.

tools.name: telos.rendering.capabilities
tools.description: Use when a host must choose WebGPU, WebGL, canvas, or static rendering fallbacks for Studio surfaces. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns a JSON renderer capability contract.

tools.name: telos.measurement.layers
tools.description: Use when visual, splat, lighting, dither, audio, uncertainty, or frame-budget evidence needs meters. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns JSON measurement layers.

tools.name: telos.workflow
tools.description: Use when validating the local five-flagship golden workflow from source checkouts. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects beyond local subprocess reads. Returns JSON receipts and verdict counts.

tools.name: telos.creative.engine
tools.description: Use when presenting the Telos Creative Engine across generative art, sound, typography, media, CGI, math, and physics lanes. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns a JSON creative-engine manifest.

tools.name: telos.creative.kernels
tools.description: Use when deterministic creative primitives are needed for dithering, pixel sorting, plotter paths, or clustered-light bins. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns JSON creative kernels.

tools.name: telos.revival.registry
tools.description: Use when deciding which older, siloed, or frozen local tools should be promoted into flagship lanes. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns a JSON revival registry.

tools.name: telos.second_level.queue
tools.description: Use when assessing public-safe second-level flagship candidates before registry promotion. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns a JSON second-level flagship queue.

tools.name: telos.workstation.substrate
tools.description: Use when a host needs public-safe aggregate intake for local workstation repositories and private/local lane families. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns a JSON workstation substrate register.

tools.name: telos.display.calibration
tools.description: Use when display, color, ICC/LUT, artifact refs, or measurement gates need a non-mutating calibration contract. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns a JSON display-calibration contract.

tools.name: telos.native.control
tools.description: Use when a host needs the Telos native background-control capability catalog for browser (Chrome DevTools Protocol) and native-app (Windows UI Automation) actuation. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns a JSON capability and verb catalog.

tools.name: telos.browser.evidence
tools.description: Use when a host needs a redacted browser evidence packet for automated browsing, research capture, work actuation, or council review. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns a JSON browser-evidence packet.

tools.name: telos.showcase.scout
tools.description: Use when a host needs fixture-backed OSS Proof Showcase candidate rankings before public patch work. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects. Returns JSON scout results.

tools.name: telos.proof
tools.description: Use when a host needs the fixture-backed agent-action proof packet joining source refs, context refs, route, admission, side effects, output digests, verifier checks, and the Emet witness stage. Read-only, zero-auth, no external side effects beyond local subprocess reads. Returns a JSON agent-action proof packet.
